printed.name: Open Leg Rocker
printed.setup: Sitting in balanced position, back flat, one hand holding each leg (close to ankles), legs shoulder width apart, arms straight, feet plantarflexed

movement.exhale: Roll up, straighten back, return to start position

cues: Initiate roll back with flexion of lumbar spine
Utilize spinal flexors to initiate movement
Utilize spinal extensors to complete movement
